data.text_en: Category:  Tropical Depression Advisory (a)                  Time of Observation:  14:00, 02 July 2026                  Location:  Latitude 17.9 North and Longitude 111.7 East                  Movement:  West 30 km/h.                  Maximum wind speed:  56 km/h                  Distance from nearest international city:  approximately 236 km Northwest of Sanya, China.                  Distance from nearest Malaysian city:  Approximately 1342 km Northwest of Kudat, Sabah.                  Threat to Malaysia:  No significant impact.
data.text_bm: Kategori:  Nasihat Lekukan Tropika (a)                  Masa Pencerapan:  14:00, 02 Julai 2026                  Kedudukan:  Latitud 17.9 Utara dan Longitud 111.7 Timur                  Pergerakan:  Ke arah Barat dengan kelajuan 30 km/j.                  Kelajuan angin maksimum:  56 km/j                  Jarak dari bandar antarabangsa terdekat:  kira-kira 236 km ke Barat Laut Sanya, China.                  Jarak dari bandar terdekat:  Kira-kira 1342 km ke Barat Laut Kudat, Sabah.                  Kesan terhadap Malaysia:  Tiada kesan signifikan.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (Second Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 50-60 kmph with wave height up to 4.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Wednesday, 8 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Kedua)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 50-60 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 4.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Rabu, 8 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Terengganu, Kelantan, Sarawak and Western Sabah and Labuan, Eastern Sabah until 6:00PM; Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Terengganu, Kelantan, Sarawak dan Sabah Barat dan Labuan, Sabah Timur sehingga 6:00 petang; Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Samui, northern part of Tioman, Condore, Reef North, Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan and Sulu until 6:00PM; Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Samui, utara Tioman, Condore, Reef North, Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan dan Sulu sehingga 6:00 petang; Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Northern Straits of Melaka, northeastern part of Condore, northern part of Reef North and Palawan until Wednesday, 8 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Selat Melaka Utara, timur laut Condore, utara Reef North dan Palawan sehingga Rabu, 8 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Sarawak:  Kuching, Samarahan (Samarahan and Asajaya), Sarikei (Julau), Sibu, Mukah (Matu, Dalat and Mukah), Kapit (Song), Bintulu (Tatau) and Limbang; and  Sabah:  Interior (Nabawan), West Coast (Kota Kinabalu, Tuaran and Kota Belud), Sandakan (Tongod and Beluran) and Kudat (Kota Marudu and Pitas) until 6:00PM; Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Sarawak:  Kuching, Samarahan (Samarahan dan Asajaya), Sarikei (Julau), Sibu, Mukah (Matu, Dalat dan Mukah), Kapit (Song), Bintulu (Tatau) dan Limbang; dan  Sabah:  Pedalaman (Nabawan), Pantai Barat (Kota Kinabalu, Tuaran dan Kota Belud), Sandakan (Tongod dan Beluran) dan Kudat (Kota Marudu dan Pitas) sehingga 6:00 petang; Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.
